youtube.com.css: img, yt-img-shadow, ytd-thumbnail, .yt-core-image, .yt-core-image--content, yt-icon, svg { display: none !important; } [style*="background-image"] { background-image: none !important; }

aspects.label: Hide images
aspects.css: img, yt-img-shadow, ytd-thumbnail, .yt-core-image, .yt-core-image--content, yt-icon, svg { display: none !important; } [style*="background-image"] { background-image: none !important; }

youtube.com.css: ytd-promoted-sparkles-web-renderer, ytd-compact-promoted-video-renderer, ytd-display-ad-renderer, ytd-ad-slot-renderer, ytd-engagement-panel-section-list-renderer[target-id="engagement-panel-ads"], ytd-player-legacy-desktop-watch-ads-renderer, ytd-action-companion-ad-renderer, ytd-banner-promo-renderer, ytd-in-feed-ad-layout-renderer, .ytd-carousel-ad-renderer, .ytd-video-masthead-ad-v3-renderer, .ytd-ad-slot-renderer { display: none !important; }

aspects.label: Remove Ads
aspects.css: ytd-promoted-sparkles-web-renderer, ytd-compact-promoted-video-renderer, ytd-display-ad-renderer, ytd-ad-slot-renderer, ytd-engagement-panel-section-list-renderer[target-id="engagement-panel-ads"], ytd-player-legacy-desktop-watch-ads-renderer, ytd-action-companion-ad-renderer, ytd-banner-promo-renderer, ytd-in-feed-ad-layout-renderer, .ytd-carousel-ad-renderer, .ytd-video-masthead-ad-v3-renderer, .ytd-ad-slot-renderer { display: none !important; }

panerabread.com.prompt: move the header to the side

tacobell.com.prompt: display deals in a sidebar on the left side of the page
